# Cosmic Cartography: Mapping the Expanse of God's Love
## Scripture
## Reflection
The universe is vast and complex, with billions of galaxies, stars, and planets. Yet, despite its enormity, the Bible tells us that God is intimately acquainted with every aspect of creation. In Job 38:4-7, we read, "Where were you when I laid the earth's foundation? Tell me, if you understand. Who marked off its dimensions? Surely you know! Who stretched a measuring line across it? On what were its footings set, or who laid its cornerstone—while the morning stars sang together and all the angels shouted for joy?" This passage reminds us that God is the cosmic cartographer, mapping the expanse of His love and creation.
## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of Your infinite power and wisdom. Help us to see the universe as a reflection of Your love and care for us. May we be awed by the complexity and beauty of creation, and may our hearts be filled with wonder and praise for You. As we navigate the complexities of life, guide us by Your wisdom and love, and may we always remember that You are the One who has mapped the expanse of our lives with purpose and meaning. In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
